parameters.name: markSeen
parameters.label: Mark email message(s) as read when fetched

mapper.textPrompt:
Extract the following fields from this invoice email and return ONLY a raw JSON object. Do not use markdown. Do not use code blocks. Do not add any explanation. Start your response with { and end with }.

{
  "vendor": "",
  "invoice_number": "",
  "invoice_date": "",
  "due_date": "",
  "amount": "",
  "currency": "",
  "status": "unpaid"
}

Email content:
{{6.fullTextBody}}

model.label: Claude Sonnet 4.5The most reliable and intelligent general purpose model for complex questions, coding, and everyday problem-solving

expect.name: useColumnHeaders
expect.label: Use column headers as IDs of the columns

mapper.subject: Payment Due Soon: {{9.invoice_number}}{{9.vendor}}
mapper.content:
Invoice {{9.invoice_number}} from {{9.vendor}} is due on {{9.due_date}}.

Amount: {{9.currency}} {{9.amount}}

Please ensure payment is made before the due date.

mapper.subject: PAYMENT DUE TODAY: {{9.invoice_number}}{{9.vendor}}
mapper.content:
Invoice {{9.invoice_number}} from {{9.vendor}} is due TODAY.

Amount: {{9.currency}} {{9.amount}}

Please process payment immediately.
